dialog_ad.title: 🎯 Complete Markdown Demo
dialog_ad.message:
# 🎁 Premium Features Showcase

## 📝 Basic Markdown Elements

### Bold & Italic
- **Bold text** for emphasis
- *Italic text* for style
- ***Bold and italic*** together

### Lists & Formatting

#### Ordered List:
1. First priority feature
2. Second priority feature
3. Third priority feature

#### Unordered List:
- Bullet point one
- Bullet point two
- Bullet point three

### Code & Technical

#### Inline Code:
Use `console.log()` for debugging

#### Code Block:
```javascript
{
  "name": "Premium User",
  "features": ["markdown", "ads", "analytics"],
  "active": true
}
```

### Links & Media

#### Links:
Visit [Markdown Guide](https://www.markdownguide.org) for more info

#### Blockquote:
> This is an important announcement
> Multiple lines of quoted text

### Horizontal Rule:
---

### Final Call to Action

🚀 **Upgrade Now!**

Get all these premium features:
- **Complete markdown support**
- **Rich formatting**
- **Links & media**
- **Code highlighting**

**Limited time offer - Don't miss out!**
